name: Paid Copy Room
description: Receipt-gated copy room where followers configure copy rules, max pain, TP/SL, approval thresholds, and alpha fee consent.
degenPitch: Paid copy access with bankroll rules instead of blind ape mode.
whatItDoes: Gates copy room access with DNA x402 receipts.
Lets followers set copy buys, sells, exits, entry range, max trade, and daily loss.
Creates copied lots and alpha fee accruals only after follower wins.
cursorPrompt: Build a Paid Copy Room with DNA x402. Gate access with receipts, let followers set max pain and copy filters, create copied lots, and charge a 5% alpha fee only on positive finalized copied-lot PnL with explicit consent.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Paid Copy Room with DNA x402. Gate access with receipts, let followers set max pain and copy filters, create copied lots, and charge a 5% alpha fee only on positive finalized copied-lot PnL with explicit consent.
exampleFlow: Copy decision engine evaluates source action
Winning copied lot accrues alpha fee
receiptProofBehavior: Copied-lot receipt binds alpha fee bps at entry.
No alpha fee is created on losses.
